debug_info.goal:
V : Type u
inst✝ : DecidableEq V
G : SimpleGraph V
u v : V
p : @SimpleGraph.LoopWalk V G u v
⊢ Finset.card (@SimpleGraph.LoopWalk.supportSet V G u v inst✝ p) ≤
    Finset.card (@SimpleGraph.LoopWalk.edgeSet V G u v inst✝ p) + 1

verification_message: All 1 attempts failed (1 strategies x 1 attempts each)
proof_attempts:
induction p with
  | nil => simp [supportSet, support, edgeSet, edges, darts]
  | loop p ih =>
    simp only [supportSet, support, edgeSet, edges, darts, List.map_cons, List.toFinset_cons]
    have : u ∈ supportSet p := by cases p <;> simp [supportSet, support]
    rw [Finset.insert_eq_of_mem this]
    exact ih.trans (Nat.add_le_add_right (Finset.card_le_card (Finset.subset_insert _ _)) 1)
  | cons h p ih =>
    simp only [supportSet, support, edgeSet, edges, darts, List.map_cons, List.toFinset_cons, dartEdge]
    have hdm : ∀ {x y}, (x, y) ∈ p.darts → x ∈ supportSet p ∧ y ∈ supportSet p := by
      intro x y hd; induction p with
      | nil => cases hd
      | cons _ q ih' =>
        cases hd with
        | head => simp [supportSet, support]; cases q <;> simp [supportSet, support]
        | tail _ h'' => specialize ih' h''; simp [supportSet, support, ih']
      | loop _ ih' =>
        cases hd with
        | head => simp [supportSet, support]
        | tail _ h'' => specialize ih' h''; simp [supportSet, support, ih']
    by_cases hu : u ∈ supportSet p
    · rw [Finset.insert_eq_of_mem hu]
      exact ih.trans (Nat.add_le_add_right (Finset.card_le_card (Finset.subset_insert _ _)) 1)
    · have he : ⟦(u, _)⟧ ∉ edgeSet p := by
        intro h'; simp [edgeSet, Sym2.eq_iff] at h'
        rcases h' with ⟨⟨x, y⟩, hd, rfl | rfl⟩ <;> [exact hu (hdm hd).1; exact hu (hdm hd).2]
      rw [Finset.card_insert_of_not_mem hu, Finset.card_insert_of_not_mem he]
      exact Nat.add_le_add_right ih 1
